title: GTM Associate, London
must_haves: 2+ years customer-facing experience (consulting, startups, sales, or customer success)
Strong communication connecting features to business outcomes
Low ego, ambitious, gritty, high bias to action
UK work authorisation without visa sponsorship
In-person London office commitment + international travel
met_strengths: Exceeds 2+ yrs customer/community-facing experience (community-led growth, onboarding 50k users)
AI power user — builds agents with Claude Code; explicit must-have met strongly
Founding-era startup operator with ownership across GTM/ops/product
hard_blockers_note: No hard blockers. Soft concerns: role is demo-delivery/sales-conversion heavy (run demos at scale, trial-to-paid conversion) — closer to sales/CS than Ryan's brand/community/content core; financial-advice/wealth domain is outside his crypto/Web3 background (only 'nice to have').
one_line_verdict: Meets every hard must-have including AI power-user and UK auth, but the sales-demo/conversion emphasis and fintech-adviser domain make it a step away from his strongest proven lane.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via Ashby posting API; full description pulled. Blackbird-backed, 650+ firms. London role distinct from Sydney/Wellington variants.
